description: Creates Okta behavior detection rules for impossible travel and anomalous location patterns. Response actions are metadata outputs consumed by sign-on policy rules — the behaviors themselves only define detection criteria.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Anomalies are logged only — no automated enforcement.
risk_profile_effects.strict: Impossible travel terminates the session; new device/city triggers MFA with admin alert.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your organization's security tier. Controls the default response actions for anomaly events. Standard logs only, Elevated requires step-up MFA, Strict terminates sessions or alerts admins.

velocity_threshold_kmh.label: Impossible Travel Speed Threshold (km/h)
velocity_threshold_kmh.client_description: The speed threshold (in km/h) for impossible travel detection. If a user authenticates from two locations that would require traveling faster than this speed, it is flagged. The default of 805 km/h (roughly commercial jet speed) catches teleportation-style fraud while allowing legitimate airline travel.

impossible_travel_action.label: Impossible Travel Response Action
impossible_travel_action.client_description: What happens when impossible travel is detected. 'log' records the event, 'step_up_mfa' forces an additional authentication challenge, 'terminate_session' ends the session immediately. Overrides the risk_profile default.

new_device_action.label: New Device Response Action
new_device_action.client_description: What happens when a user logs in from a previously unseen device. 'log' records the event, 'step_up_mfa' forces an additional challenge, 'step_up_mfa_alert' forces MFA and notifies admins. Overrides the risk_profile default.

new_city_action.label: New City Response Action
new_city_action.client_description: What happens when a user logs in from a city they have not used before. 'log' records the event, 'step_up_mfa' forces an additional challenge, 'step_up_mfa_alert' forces MFA and notifies admins. Overrides the risk_profile default.

outputs.velocity_anomaly_id: Behavior ID for impossible travel detection rule
outputs.new_city_id: Behavior ID for new city detection rule
outputs.impossible_travel_action: Effective action for impossible travel events (metadata for sign-on policies)
outputs.new_device_action: Effective action for new device events (metadata for sign-on policies)
outputs.new_city_action: Effective action for new city events (metadata for sign-on policies)
